description_long: This is a medium-sized glass bottle filled with orange-colored juice, featuring a contoured shape with two distinct bulges along its body. The bottle is sealed with a small, round screw cap that appears to be made of metal or plastic, with a printed design on top. The main label is predominantly red and white, wrapping around the upper half of the bottle, and displays the brand name 'EASY' along with a vivid illustration of an orange fruit, indicating the juice flavor. Additional text and nutritional information panels are visible on the sides and back of the label. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the juice inside is opaque and vibrant. This type of bottle is commonly found in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or outdoor refreshment stands.
description: A contoured glass bottle filled with orange juice, featuring a red and white label with an orange fruit illustration and a screw cap.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back label with nutritional information and text.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label text and a glimpse of the brand logo.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'EASY' brand label and a clear orange fruit illustration.
description_view_3: Side view with label text and partial brand logo visible.
